---
name: Feature Suggestion
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for the Barbero Demo site
title: "feat: <brief description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

What would you like to see added or improved?

## Problem or Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what gap does it fill? Why would it improve the site?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change or feature you have in mind. Include mockups or examples if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is your proposed solution preferable?

## Scope Check

Please confirm this suggestion is within the scope of the demo site:

- [ ] This is about the demo site itself (UI, function cards, layout, accessibility, etc.)
- [ ] This is **not** a request to change the barbero library — library changes should be raised at [barbero](https://github.com/BhuannaichFhirinn/barbero/issues)

## Additional Context

Any other detail or context that might be useful.
